title: Resource APIs, Idempotency, Concurrency, Pagination, and Consistency · Guided Contract Studio
summary: A backend pairing room predicts runtime, request, middleware, dependency, response, and cleanup transitions before assembling the first consistent resource API and operation ledger for resource apis, idempotency, concurrency, pagination, and consistency. Planned artifact: Build a complete first version of consistent resource API and operation ledger while every earlier competency remains active. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and…
objectives: Model resource states, legal transitions, commands, representations, invariants, tombstones, and conflict outcomes independently of table layout.
Scope idempotency keys to principal and operation, compare canonical request fingerprints, store outcome atomically, expire deliberately, and reject mismatches.
Connect version columns, ETags, preconditions, atomic updates, affected-row checks, conflict disclosure, and safe retry behavior.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Node and Express server Commit to the mission model · Workshop Resource State Machine
steps.instruction:
workshop case — A workshop team handles case 3218 in a partner integration using an older generated TypeScript client. Build deterministic TypeScript evidence to join idempotency fingerprints, optimistic concurrency, and transactional outbox evidence; prove cleanup before the service deadline expires; then replace an average latency claim with p95 and event-loop saturation evidence. Browser code models pure decisions only. Node, Express, listener, TLS, PostgreSQL, proxy, worker, load, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates.

What must be established before implementation?

Evidence target: Node and Express server Commit to the mission model · Workshop Resource State Machine.
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for model resource states, legal transitions, commands, representations, invariants, tombstones, and conflict outcomes independently of table layout. For Node and Express server Commit to the mission model · Workshop Resource State Machine, keep Resource State Machine connected to executable HTTP client decision evidence.

content.text: A workshop team handles case 1062 in a partner integration using an older generated TypeScript client. Build deterministic TypeScript evidence to join idempotency fingerprints, optimistic concurrency, and transactional outbox evidence; prove cleanup before the service deadline expires; then reuse an idempotency key with different input and reject the fingerprint mismatch. Browser code models pure decisions only. Node, Express, listener, TLS, PostgreSQL, proxy, worker, load, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Persist state and an outbox fact atomically, publish with deduplication and ordering assumptions, and reconcile stuck or duplicate delivery.

content.title: Fault-isolation decision
content.text: Select evidence that identifies a cause, not a patch that only hides the Outbox Consistency symptom in consistent resource API and operation ledger during this workshop case.

content.label: Authority to consult after committing
content.value: HTTP Semantics — Controls resources, methods, status, fields, conditional requests, negotiation, authentication semantics, intermediaries, and caching relationships.

stimulus.title: Outbox Consistency failure evidence
stimulus.caption: A plausible visible result conflicts with the governing contract and requires a cause-level repair.

lines.label: observed
lines.text: Publishing an event immediately after COMMIT makes state and message delivery atomic.

lines.label: required
lines.text: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Persist state and an outbox fact atomically, publish with deduplication and ordering assumptions, and reconcile stuck or duplicate delivery.

options.text: Reject the unsupported conclusion, name the violated Outbox Consistency condition, repair the responsible layer, and rerun the boundary trace.

Keep the plausible Outbox Consistency output and hide the violated consistent resource API and operation ledger assumption instead of explaining the failure. That claim fails the test an acceptance boundary evidence boundary for Outbox Consistency.

For test an acceptance boundary, run one convenient Outbox Consistency happy path, omit method, authority, credential, byte, time, redirect, retry, and cleanup boundaries, then accept plausible output. This does not satisfy Outbox Consistency for consistent resource API and operation ledger.

steps.title: Node and Express server Defend the transferred model · Workshop Outbox Consistency
steps.instruction:
Write the workshop evidence note for Outbox Consistency: explain the governing condition, one failure, and how this concrete case was verified — A workshop team handles case 2681 in a partner integration using an older generated TypeScript client. Build deterministic TypeScript evidence to join idempotency fingerprints, optimistic concurrency, and transactional outbox evidence; prove cleanup before the service deadline expires; then emit a server error and retain one low-cardinality causal trace. Browser code models pure decisions only. Node, Express, listener, TLS, PostgreSQL, proxy, worker, load, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Persist state and an outbox fact atomically, publish with deduplication and ordering assumptions, and reconcile stuck or duplicate delivery.

Evidence target: Node and Express server Defend the transferred model · Workshop Outbox Consistency.
steps.why: Retrieving Outbox Consistency through the concrete consistent resource API and operation ledger case exposes causal gaps that recognition alone can hide. For Node and Express server Defend the transferred model · Workshop Outbox Consistency, keep Outbox Consistency connected to executable HTTP client decision evidence.

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Persist state and an outbox fact atomically, publish with deduplication and ordering assumptions, and reconcile stuck or duplicate delivery.
